title: erodium cicutarium f. praecox
intro: Erodium cicutarium f. praecox, also known as the redstem filaree or redstem storksbill, is a subspecies of the plant Erodium cicutarium. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and skin irritations, as well as provide cardiovascular and antimicrobial benefits. Erodium cicutarium f. praecox can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture to be consumed for its medicinal properties.
